Home / Services / Pre-Purchase Inspections

Pre-Purchase Inspections

Comprehensive used vehicle evaluations before you buy.

Memphis' used car market offers great deals—and some hidden problems. Our 150-point inspections help you avoid costly surprises.

We go beyond basic checks to examine flood damage indicators (critical in our river city), frame straightness, and engine computer history. For trucks frequently used on Mississippi Delta farms, we pay special attention to undercarriage corrosion. Our written reports include repair estimates so you can negotiate intelligently.

Inspections typically take 90 minutes and can be done at our shop or the seller's location. We'll explain our findings in plain English—no confusing jargon—so you can make an informed decision.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: VIN check for accident history and title issues
  2. 02 Step 2: Complete mechanical inspection from bumper to bumper
  3. 03 Step 3: Road test including highway speeds
  4. 04 Step 4: Written report with photos and repair estimates

Benefits

  • Avoid buying someone else's problem vehicle
  • Negotiation leverage with documented issues
  • Peace of mind about major systems
  • Expert assessment of repair costs

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you inspect cars at dealerships?

Yes, we frequently inspect vehicles at Memphis-area dealerships—just arrange access with the seller first.

Do you check for flood damage specifically?

Absolutely—we know all the hidden indicators Memphis flood cars exhibit, including water lines in unusual places.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with pre-purchase inspections? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-aut-r94
